TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ethiopia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 38 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,104,300 sq km (maki' tay 27ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,000,000 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 104,300 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 102,374,044. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 36.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 12.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 51.50%. kian rhyal Isopiya na rhyal ru kinlabang ga qutux kbhul mopuw mang ru payat seng cyugal kbhulpin fang kong li,qalang na kinwagiq na Isopiya te cyugal lpgun ga kaki balay sa te sazing kinhopa nya ,kinwagiq nya ga sazing seng tehuk cyugal seng konzi,maki sa Feco llamu na koka ga rhyal nya ga spyang wagiq balay；te htgan wagi ru kura mkilux ga pgluw na Somaliya wagiq na rhyal；htgan wagi na Feco mshzyu ru mthwiru sa teska na kwara koka；kinlabang bbnaqi ru smka na bbnaqi pkaki sa mpusal mspat %. Kahul kawas 1993 magal byacing qalang Elisweya babaw na mbuci psrux koka nha nanak,Isopiya lga mrhyal na te zzit na koka,bih mya ga kya qu rhyal na Ciputi,Elisweya,Sutan,Nansutan,Knniya ru Somaliya.Hopa qalang na ga Atisaperl.Kya uzi binah,ru Kinya,Nansutan msqes sa Iinlemisanzaw,Isopiya ru Nansutan ptkke kmal kwara mha kun qu cinqalang ru pklahang rhyal qani,misu ga Kinya qu nyux lmahang. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Addis Ababa. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 28 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mulatu Teshome, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: etħiopia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** n, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. kian rħjal is~ɕopija na rħjal ru kinlaβaŋ ɣa qutux kβħul mopuw maŋ ru pajat s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħulpin *aŋ koŋ li,qalaŋ na kinwaɣiq na is~ɕopija te ʦ~ʨjuɣal lpɣun ɣa kaki βalaj s~ɕa te s~ɕaziŋ kinħopa nja ,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ teħuk ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕeŋ konzi,maki s~ɕa *eʦ~ʨo llamu na koka ɣa rħjal nja ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq βalaj*te ħtɣan waɣi ru kura mkilux ɣa pɣluw na s~ɕomalija waɣiq na rħjal*ħtɣan waɣi na *eʦ~ʨo ms~ɕħzju ru mtħwiru s~ɕa tes~ɕka na kwara koka*kinlaβaŋ ββnaqi ru s~ɕmka na ββnaqi pkaki s~ɕa mpus~ɕal ms~ɕpat %. kaħul kawas~ɕ **** maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qalaŋ elis~ɕweja βaβaw na mβuʦ~ʨi ps~ɕrux koka nħa nanak,is~ɕopija lɣa mrħjal na te zzit na koka,βiħ mja ɣa kja qu rħjal na ʦ~ʨiputi,elis~ɕweja,s~ɕutan,nans~ɕutan,knnija ru s~ɕomalija.ħopa qalaŋ na ɣa atis~ɕaperl.kja uzi βinaħ,ru kinja,nans~ɕutan ms~ɕqes~ɕ s~ɕa iinlemis~ɕanzaw,is~ɕopija ru nans~ɕutan ptkke kmal kwara mħa kun qu ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ ru pklaħaŋ rħjal qani,mis~ɕu ɣa kinja qu njux lmaħaŋ. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa a**is~ɕ aβaβa. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mulatu tes~ɕħome, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Ethiopia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 8 00 N, 38 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,104,300 sq km (maki' tay 27ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,000,000 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 104,300 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 102,374,044. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 36.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 12.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 51.50%. kian rhyal Isopiya na rhyal ru kinlabang ga qutux kbhul mopuw mang ru payat seng cyugal kbhulpin fang kong li,qalang na kinwagiq na Isopiya te cyugal lpgun ga kaki balay sa te sazing kinhopa nya ,kinwagiq nya ga sazing seng tehuk cyugal seng konzi,maki sa Feco llamu na koka ga rhyal nya ga spyang wagiq balay；te htgan wagi ru kura mkilux ga pgluw na Somaliya wagiq na rhyal；htgan wagi na Feco mshzyu ru mthwiru sa teska na kwara koka；kinlabang bbnaqi ru smka na bbnaqi pkaki sa mpusal mspat %. Kahul kawas 1993 magal byacing qalang Elisweya babaw na mbuci psrux koka nha nanak,Isopiya lga mrhyal na te zzit na koka,bih mya ga kya qu rhyal na Ciputi,Elisweya,Sutan,Nansutan,Knniya ru Somaliya.Hopa qalang na ga Atisaperl.Kya uzi binah,ru Kinya,Nansutan msqes sa Iinlemisanzaw,Isopiya ru Nansutan ptkke kmal kwara mha kun qu cinqalang ru pklahang rhyal qani,misu ga Kinya qu nyux lmahang. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Addis Ababa. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 28 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mulatu Teshome, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: etħiopia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** n, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. kian rħjal is~ɕopija na rħjal ru kinlaβaŋ ɣa qutux kβħul mopuw maŋ ru pajat s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħulpin *aŋ koŋ li,qalaŋ na kinwaɣiq na is~ɕopija te ʦ~ʨjuɣal lpɣun ɣa kaki βalaj s~ɕa te s~ɕaziŋ kinħopa nja ,kinwaɣiq nja ɣa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ teħuk ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕeŋ konzi,maki s~ɕa *eʦ~ʨo llamu na koka ɣa rħjal nja ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq βalaj*te ħtɣan waɣi ru kura mkilux ɣa pɣluw na s~ɕomalija waɣiq na rħjal*ħtɣan waɣi na *eʦ~ʨo ms~ɕħzju ru mtħwiru s~ɕa tes~ɕka na kwara koka*kinlaβaŋ ββnaqi ru s~ɕmka na ββnaqi pkaki s~ɕa mpus~ɕal ms~ɕpat %. kaħul kawas~ɕ **** maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qalaŋ elis~ɕweja βaβaw na mβuʦ~ʨi ps~ɕrux koka nħa nanak,is~ɕopija lɣa mrħjal na te zzit na koka,βiħ mja ɣa kja qu rħjal na ʦ~ʨiputi,elis~ɕweja,s~ɕutan,nans~ɕutan,knnija ru s~ɕomalija.ħopa qalaŋ na ɣa atis~ɕaperl.kja uzi βinaħ,ru kinja,nans~ɕutan ms~ɕqes~ɕ s~ɕa iinlemis~ɕanzaw,is~ɕopija ru nans~ɕutan ptkke kmal kwara mħa kun qu ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ ru pklaħaŋ rħjal qani,mis~ɕu ɣa kinja qu njux lmaħaŋ. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa a**is~ɕ aβaβa. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mulatu tes~ɕħome, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
